summary: An NBC '10 Investigators' report clip showing a graphic of immigration adjudication statistics, including a bar chart and a table of case-decision outcomes, beside an exterior view of a building labeled 'DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE'. A chyron reads 'VOLUNTARY DEPARTURE PROGRAM'.

script.scene: A statistics graphic with a bar chart and a case-outcomes table is shown beside a 'DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE' building; chyron 'VOLUNTARY DEPARTURE PROGRAM'.
The same statistics graphic continues on screen.

notable_text: ADJUDICATION STATISTICS; DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE; VOLUNTARY DEPARTURE PROGRAM; 10 INVESTIGATORS
